baseSpans.name: execute_event_loop_cycle
baseSpans.input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use both the get_weather tool AND the get_time tool for Paris. Call both tools exactly once each.
baseSpans.output: <thinking> The User has requested information about both the current weather and the current time for Paris. I need to call both the get_weather and get_time tools once each to gather this information. </thinking>

agentSpans.name: invoke_agent Strands Agents
agentSpans.input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use both the get_weather tool AND the get_time tool for Paris. Call both tools exactly once each.
agentSpans.output:
<thinking> I have received the current weather and time for Paris from the tools. I can now provide the User with this information. </thinking>

The current weather in Paris is cloudy, with a temperature of 62 degrees Fahrenheit, and the current time is 8:00 AM Central European Time (CET).
